params.isYes: true = buy YES, false = buy NO

params._deadline: Unix timestamp; resolution expected by this date
params._initLiquidity: Initial USDC already transferred by factory
params._owner: Address that can resolve (receives initial LP shares)
params._usdc: USDC token address on Arc Testnet

params.isYes: true = sell YES, false = sell NO

addLiquidity(uint256).notice: Add USDC liquidity, preserving the current YES/NO price ratio.

buyOutcome(bool,uint256,uint256).notice: Buy YES or NO outcome tokens with USDC.   Buying YES with c USDC:     k = yesR * noR     tokensOut = (yesR + c) - k / (noR + c)     yesR_new  = k / (noR + c)     noR_new   = noR + c

getMarketInfo().notice: Returns all market state needed by the frontend in one call.

getPrice(bool).notice: Returns implied probability as 1e18-scaled fixed point.         price(YES) = noReserve / (yesReserve + noReserve)

redeem().notice: Redeem winning tokens 1:1 for USDC after resolution.

removeLiquidity(uint256).notice: Remove liquidity proportional to LP share ownership.

resolve(bool).notice: Resolve the market. onlyOwner.         TODO: integrate Chainlink CRE automation trigger here.

sellOutcome(bool,uint256,uint256).notice: Sell YES or NO outcome tokens back for USDC.   Selling s YES tokens for c USDC solves:     (yesR + s - c)(noR - c) = k     c² - (yesR + s + noR)c + noR*s = 0     c = [(yesR+s+noR) - sqrt((yesR+s+noR)² - 4*noR*s)] / 2
